title: urena lobata var. multifida
intro: Urena lobata var. multifida, also known as the prickly burrweed, is a type of plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Urena lobata var. multifida include wound healing, treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and relief from fever and respiratory infections, with herbal preparations often taking the form of infusions or topical applications.
